name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: 2800 Broadway in Sacramento, CA hosts California Check Cashing Stores, providing check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
description_long:
California Check Cashing Stores operates its Sacramento, CA location at 2800 Broadway Suite 3, serving residents of the midtown and downtown areas with convenient check cashing services. The store is open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays. This standalone location is easily accessible for Sacramento residents needing quick financial services.

At this Sacramento location, you can cash checks, send money transfers, pay bills, and access other financial services. The team at California Check Cashing Stores on Broadway is ready to help with your check cashing needs — call 916-731-7296 to confirm services or get specific information about what's available for your situation.

For Sacramento residents heading to the 2800 Broadway location, bring a valid ID and your check. Whether you need emergency cash on a Saturday or want to skip the bank lines, this California Check Cashing Stores location in Sacramento, CA gets you in and out quickly.
pros: Multiple San Francisco locations (at least 3 documented branches) for convenient access
Extended operating hours including Saturday service (10 AM–4 PM) and weekday service until 7 PM
Online payroll advance application available in addition to in-store options
Transparent upfront disclosure of application requirements (ID, income proof, bank account info, SSN)
Integrated services including bill pay, money orders, Western Union transfers, and tax prep at same locations
Fast payroll advances up to $250 available same-day or next business day
Mandatory consumer notice warning about high cost of long-term small-dollar loans
cons: Maximum payroll advance of only $250 is insufficient for most financial emergencies or larger expenses
Website contains disclaimer that 'not all clients will qualify' and 'restrictions apply' without disclosing specific rates, fees, or APR terms
No information provided on website about actual interest rates, fees, or total cost of borrowing for payday advances
Loan eligibility explicitly stated as 'based on ability to repay and other underwriting criteria' with approval not guaranteed
Green Dot debit card requires multiple verification steps (text, email, identity verification) which may create friction for less tech-comfortable customers
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked San Francisco residents who need immediate check cashing services without a bank account
Salaried employees needing small advances ($100–$250) between paychecks for emergency expenses
Customers seeking one-stop financial convenience (bill pay, money transfers, tax prep) in a physical location
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual financial services (Spanish-language notices present on site)
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for San Francisco residents without traditional bank accounts who need quick check cashing and small emergency advances ($100–$250) between paychecks. The critical caveat is that website transparency is limited—no APR, fees, or total borrowing costs are disclosed, and loan approval is explicitly not guaranteed despite application submission.
services: Green Dot Visa reloadable debit cards
Bank account linking and routing number processing
meta_description: Sacramento, CA — California Check Cashing Stores at 2800 Broadway, Suite 3. Check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
